name: A Causal Model of Theory of Mind in Conflict for Artificial Intelligence
summary: arXiv:2606.16944v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Theory of mind (ToM), the capacity to ascribe mental states to others and use those ascriptions for prediction and inference, is widely assumed t...
description: arXiv:2606.16944v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Theory of mind (ToM), the capacity to ascribe mental states to others and use those ascriptions for prediction and inference, is widely assumed to be essential for effective human-machine integration. Existing AI-ToM models address \emph{how} to mentalize, but leave the question of when largely unaddressed. The central question is: under what...
author: Nikolos Gurney
